growth_records.medium: Kueng mineral medium, sucrose as sole carbon source (PHB production, 1st bioreactor cultivation)

up.method: derived qS=mu_max/Yxs=0.41/0.18=2.28 g sucrose/gDW/h; /342.3 g/mol *1000=6.66 mmol/gDW/h (rough; Yxs is overall incl. unutilized sugar)

up.units: g/(L.h) as reported (likely mislabeled total, not a true rate)
up.method: paper states 'A total sugar consumption of 29.14 g/(L.h) was observed'; recorded verbatim, units doubtful

sec.method: reported max specific productivity qP=0.19 g/(g.h) at t=7.25 h

growth_records.cite: Miranda de Sousa Dias, Miguel et al. Fed-Batch Synthesis of Poly(3-Hydroxybutyrate) and Poly(3-Hydroxybutyrate-co-4-Hydroxybutyrate) from Sucrose and 4-Hydroxybutyrate Precursors by Burkholderia sacchari Strain DSM 17165. Bioengineering (Basel) (2017). DOI:10.3390/bioengineering4020036. [PMC5590455]
growth_records.method: reported: Table 1 mu_max=0.41 /h (t=3.75-6 h); td=ln2/0.41=1.69 h. NOTE abstract states mu_max=0.15 /h (discrepancy).
growth_records.snippet: mu_max 0.41 (t=3.75-6 h); max CDM 70.0 g/L (t=25.25 h); max PHA concentration 36.8 g/L; max fraction of PHA in CDM 53.0%; Volumetric productivity for PHA 1.29 g/L.h; Yield_CDM/sucrose 0.18 g/g; max specific productivity qP 0.19 g/(g.h) (t=7
growth_records.notes: PHB fed-batch bioreactor run. mu_max from Table 1 = 0.41/h (abstract says 0.15/h - internal discrepancy, Table value used, abstract flagged). td=ln2/0.41=1.69 h. Yxs=0.18 g CDM/g sucrose (overall, incl. unutilized sugar per authors). Derived sucrose qS=0.41/0.18=2.28 g/gDW/h=6.66 mmol/gDW/h (approximate). PHB is intracellular polymer, qP max 0.19 g/g/h. Sucrose rapidly hydrolyzed to glucose+fructose by extracellular invertase. Full Kueng mineral base not restated for this run; only sucrose 15 g/L + (NH4)2SO4 2.5 g/L at start given.

growth_records.medium: PHBISA-type mineral medium, sucrose + GBL co-feed (P(3HB-co-4HB) production, 2nd bioreactor cultivation)

up.method: derived qS=mu_max/Yxs=0.23/0.38=0.605 g sucrose/gDW/h; 0.605/342.3 g/mol *1000=1.77 mmol/gDW/h

sec.method: reported max specific productivity qP=0.17 g/(g.h) at t=17.75 h

growth_records.cite: Miranda de Sousa Dias, Miguel et al. Fed-Batch Synthesis of Poly(3-Hydroxybutyrate) and Poly(3-Hydroxybutyrate-co-4-Hydroxybutyrate) from Sucrose and 4-Hydroxybutyrate Precursors by Burkholderia sacchari Strain DSM 17165. Bioengineering (Basel) (2017). DOI:10.3390/bioengineering4020036. [PMC5590455]
growth_records.method: reported: Table 1 mu_max=0.23 /h (t=6-8 h); td=ln2/0.23=3.01 h. NOTE abstract states mu_max=0.18 /h (discrepancy).
growth_records.snippet: mu_max 0.23 (t=6-8 h); max CDM 78.6 g/L (t=32 h); max PHA concentration 55.8 g/L; max fraction of PHA in CDM 72.6%; max fraction of 4HB in PHA 1.6% mol/mol; Volumetric productivity for PHA 1.87 g/L.h; Yield_CDM/sucrose 0.38 g/g; Yield 4HB/G
growth_records.notes: P(3HB-co-4HB) fed-batch bioreactor run with GBL co-feed. mu_max Table 1 = 0.23/h (abstract says 0.18/h - discrepancy; Table used). td=ln2/0.23=3.01 h. Yxs=0.38 g CDM/g sucrose. Derived sucrose qS=0.23/0.38=0.605 g/gDW/h=1.77 mmol/gDW/h. 4HB/GBL yield 0.05 g/g; max 4HB in PHA 1.6 mol%. PHA intracellular polymer qP max 0.17 g/g/h. Full mineral medium given (PHBISA-type).

growth_records.cite: Jiang et al. Carbon Sources for Polyhydroxyalkanoates and an Integrated Biorefinery. International Journal of Molecular Sciences (2016). DOI:10.3390/ijms17071157. [PMC4964529]
growth_records.snippet: B. sacchari was grown on the mixture, accumulating about 60% of cell dry weight and a conversion of 0.19 g P3HB/g.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW in-text secondary value (Cesario et al. [54]). B. sacchari on wheat-straw hydrolysate, ~60% P3HB of CDW, 0.19 g P3HB/g. Commercial hexose+pentose mix control gave ~70% CDW, 0.18 g/g.
